business.name: Premium Exterior Cleaning
business.tagline: Making Norfolk homes look like new

hero.headline: *Years of grime* gone in one afternoon
hero.subheadline: That concrete you thought was permanently stained? We'll make it look ten years younger.

services_section.label: WHAT WE CLEAN
services_section.heading: Every surface that needs attention
services_section.subheading: From driveways that haven't been cleaned in years to siding that's lost its shine

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Siding, brick, and exterior surfaces restored to original condition. Remove years of dirt, mildew, and stains.

services.title: Concrete Cleaning
services.description: Driveways, patios, walkways, and steps. Make concrete look amazing again, even after years of neglect.

services.title: Deck Restoration
services.description: Power washing and restaining services. Transform weathered decks into outdoor spaces you'll actually want to use.

services.title: Gutter & Window Cleaning
services.description: Complete exterior detail work. Gutters, windows, and screens cleaned to perfection.

about.heading: Particular about the details
about.body: We're the Norfolk pressure washing team that shows up when we say we will. Victor and the crew take their time to do it right — because your home deserves better than a quick rinse.

reviews.name: Bobbi R.
reviews.text: Victor did an outstanding job on our house and concrete patio. The concrete hadn't been cleaned in 10 years and was really grungy — he made it look amazing. Very particular in his work.

reviews.name: Daniel N.
reviews.text: Great communication, showed up when he said he would, and did excellent work. Even added on extra power washing with no problem. Will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Ginny F.
reviews.text: Reliable, fair pricing, and excellent work on our deck and gutters. Superior job staining the deck. Highly recommend Victor and his team.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Norfolk and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional pressure washing throughout Hampton Roads

cta.heading: Ready to see the difference?
cta.body: Free estimates on all exterior cleaning projects. No hidden fees, no pressure — just honest pricing and quality work.
